message:
feat(combinator): implement first_ok! macro body and fix panic/cancel semantics across combinators

first_ok! macro: replaced the placeholder stub with a working sequential
implementation. The macro now awaits each operation in order, returning
FirstOkResult::success on the first Ok outcome and short-circuiting on
Cancelled or Panicked (which are non-recoverable). Includes a @count
helper for compile-time operation counting and three new tests verifying
success return, short-circuit skipping of later operations, and early
termination on cancellation.

Hedge combinator: updated documentation to reflect actual semantics —
the standalone future drops (not drains) the losing branch. Removed
claims about awaiting loser drain that were aspirational rather than
implemented. The loser is represented as Outcome::Cancelled(race_loser).

Quorum combinator: moved panic detection before the quorum_met check so
that panics in any branch (winner or loser) propagate immediately rather
than being silently absorbed when quorum was met. A panic is a
catastrophic failure regardless of quorum satisfaction.

Race combinator: fixed test assertion for panic index (1, not 0) to
match actual branch ordering after the previous winner_index→index
rename for panic variants.

Retry: clamp max_attempts to minimum 1 in RetryState::new to prevent
zero-attempt configurations that would silently skip the operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
